title: Jaipur Hosts National e-Governance Conference 2026 Focusing on AI and Digital Governance
description: Jaipur has become the focal point for the National e-Governance Conference 2026, where over 2,700 delegates gather to discuss advancements in digital governance, AI, and data-driven administration. Chief Minister Bhajanlal Sharma inaugurated the event, highlighting new initiatives aimed at enhancing Rajasthan's digital landscape. The conference emphasizes the importance of technology in promoting social inclusion and efficient governance, with a vision for a developed India by 2047. Key announcements include the launch of new digital services and a focus on AI and machine learning policies. This event marks a significant step towards establishing Rajasthan as a leader in digital governance and innovation.

title: Big Tech loses $2.3 trillion in June as investors ask: Where are AI returns?
description: The CNBC Magnificent 7 Index fell 10 percent in June, with Microsoft, Nvidia, Apple and Amazon among the major decliners.

title: Grow Predictably Publishes The AI Collaboration Matrix — When to Use AI, and When Not To
description: Two-axis framework forces a 30-second pre-flight classification before opening AI — three of four quadrants explicitly forbid full AI co-thinking.
